<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$SDPS$ = Splash Damage / Firerate
$TDPS$ = $DPS$ + $SDPS$
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 4500; 1500; 5500; 15750; 25000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 2000; 650; 2400; 8500; 17000
$FSE-DETECTION$ = ; 2; 0
$FSE-PVP-DETECTION$ = ; 0; 0
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Faster Reloading; Intelligence Radio; Trained Outlaw; Experimental Weapon of Destruction
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 3280081327; 3381734408; 3381735232; 3381735846
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Advanced
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Splash Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Buff Range !! Explosion Range !! Range Buff !! Buff Time !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 100 || N/A || 6 || 70 || N/A || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 100 || N/A || 4.75 || 70 || N/A || N/A || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 185 || N/A || 4.75 || 70 || 12 || N/A || 10% || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 430 || N/A || 4.5 || 70 || 12 || N/A || 10% || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 875 || 375 || 8 || 70 || 12 || 5 || 10% || 20 || $TDPS$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $SDPS$ Splash DPS.<br/>DPS assumes only one enemy is hit.</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Splash Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Buff Range !! Explosion Range !! Range Buff !! Buff Time !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || N/A || 3 || 50 || N/A || N/A || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || N/A || 2.5 || 50 || N/A || N/A || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 74 || N/A || 2.5 || 50 || 12 || N/A || 15% || 120 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 148 || N/A || 2 || 50 || 12 || N/A || 15% || 120 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 272 || 25 || 2 || 50 || 12 || 5 || 15% || 120 || $TDPS$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $SDPS$ Splash DPS.<br/>DPS assumes only one enemy is hit.</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
